title: Seven people observed 2 oval UFOs on the campus of UNESP in Araçatuba-SP [1996]

text_preview:
Interrelated with cases 474 and 452

SEPT 2nd, 1996. Time: 19h15. A group of seven people on the Campus of the University of São Paulo – UNESP, in Araçatuba, São Paulo, observed two unidentified flying objects with oval shapes, moving at a “slow, subtle” speed. According to the witnesses, the UFOs followed a “straight path; over the city; one made [a] ninety degree turn to the Northeast”. The UFOs were sighted at an altitude of approximately 500m, and at about 10km [horizontal] distance from the observers. Although distant, the witnesses saw them as “the size of a soccer ball”. The objects wer
summary: Seven people on the UNESP campus in Araçatuba-SP observed two amber oval UFOs with blue halos and red centers, one making a 90-degree turn, on Sept 2, 1996.
